name: Prancing Pony Common Room
description:
You have entered the bustling common room of the Prancing Pony, Bree's largest
and best-known inn and tavern.  This is a meeting place for all manner of
travelers along the Great East Road and Greenway.  Barliman Butterbur, the
innkeeper, is serving ale to There are private rooms to the northeast of the
common room.  A large clock ticks loudly on the mantel.  A menu is mounted on
the wall.  Go ahead and order anything you like from the menu.
